import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  let n = tokens.len()
  if n == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    let first_str = match tokens.get(0)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let first = match string.parse_int(first_str)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut max_val = first
    mut min_val = first
    mut i = 1
    while i < n
      let tok = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        ""
      end
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v > max_val
        max_val = v
      end
      if v < min_val
        min_val = v
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print("max=#{max_val}")
    print("min=#{min_val}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
